title: Official-source research: DOB NOW Open Data family
objective: Discover, document, and evidence the best available official sources for the DOB NOW family (PRD 8.1): DOB NOW Build job filings/permits, DOB NOW Safety (facades/boilers/elevators where applicable), approved permits datasets; identify exact Socrata dataset IDs, schemas, BBL/BIN join semantics, update cadence, pagination/rate limits, null semantics, known limitations, and fallback sources; produce source-registry draft records and an open-questions ledger; NO connector implementation
business_reason: Owner directive 2026-07-17: DOB NOW research may run in a parallel slot but must not delay the Confirm-screen critical path; PRD 8.1 mandatory family; M2 DOB fact connectors depend on it
inputs: Accepted research pattern + evidence standard: project-control/reports/M1-T003-* and M1-T004-* (G0/G1/G3 chains), docs/research/* from M1-T001/T003/T004
Agent memory: .claude/agent-memory/official-source-researcher/project_nyc-source-fetch-channels.md (nyc.gov 403 wall, Socrata techniques, s-media PDF trick, WebFetch URL-hallucination guard)
PRD 8.1/8.2 (mandatory family + source-registry record fields); NYC Open Data Socrata catalog; api-portal.nyc.gov is bot-blocked (evidence via catalog/data.cityofnewyork.us instead)
outputs: docs/research/M1-T007-dob-now-sources.md: per-dataset sections (exact Socrata 4x4 IDs verified live, official names, agency, schema/column inventory from the live metadata API, BBL/BIN join semantics with observed value formats, update cadence vs observed rowsUpdatedAt, pagination/maxRecordCount, auth/rate limits, null/unknown semantics, known limitations, fallback source), each claim with URL + retrieval date
Source-registry draft records (same draft location/format the accepted M1-T003/T004 research used)
Open-questions ledger (OQ-numbered) for anything requiring credentials, a browser session, or owner decisions
Small verbatim response fixtures (KB-scale) for 1-2 representative records per key dataset, saved under docs/research/fixtures/ with retrieval commands
forbidden_paths: services/**, apps/**, packages/**, .github/**, project-control/** (except own producer report), all other docs/**
acceptance_scenarios: S1: every recommended dataset has a live-verified Socrata ID with a captured metadata response (not assumed from memory or old docs)
S2: BBL/BIN join semantics stated with observed evidence (actual field names + example values + format quirks like zero-padding), never guessed
S3: freshness: stated update cadence cross-checked against live rowsUpdatedAt; staleness flagged as degraded_suspected where observed (M1-T003 precedent)
S4: negative/ambiguous case: at least one plausible-but-wrong or deprecated dataset identified and explicitly ruled out with evidence
S5: every registry-required field (PRD 8.2) present or explicitly marked unknown with an OQ entry
S6: no connector code, no schema changes, no scope creep beyond the DOB NOW family
risks: nyc.gov + api-portal.nyc.gov are bot-blocked (403): evidence must come from data.cityofnewyork.us / catalog endpoints / council channels; do not claim a page unreachable without recording the attempt
DOB NOW vs legacy BIS datasets are easily confused - the family boundary (DOB NOW only; BIS is the NEXT research task) must stay crisp with explicit rule-outs
PARALLEL-SLOT rule (owner): this task must never block or delay the Confirm-screen critical path; if the orchestrator needs the slot, this task pauses
execution_location: research is network + text only; producer writes KB-scale markdown/fixtures in the task worktree; no installs, no datasets; disk impact negligible (7.77 GB free)
